name: Strict Rate Limits (Under Attack)
description: Aggressive rate limiting for when you're actively being attacked. Significantly reduces request throughput to mitigate DDoS, brute-force, and flooding attacks. Use temporarily during incidents.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Emergency Rate Limit
rules.notes: 2 req/s, 30 req/min. Very restrictive — may impact legitimate users. Use only during active attacks.
